Details reliability controls: retry with backoff, idempotency keys

recent_turns.text: Using your primary iPaaS, walk me through a near-real-time Salesforce to on-prem ERP order sync.
Okay Uh, hey, uh, sorry, uh, I didn't quite understand the question, but it's ARP.
An ERP is an on-prem system for orders and inventory. Using your iPaaS, how would you sync Salesforce orders into it in near real time?

judge_input.candidate_utterance: Uh, sure. So like, I'd first like expose, say its Salesforce platform event, consume it via my iPaaS tool, then transform the payload and send it to the on-prem ERP through a secure channel like a VPN or on-prem agent. I implement retrace with exponential backoffs to make sure it's working and it's secure and idempotent using order IDs.
